violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
Dispensers with soap and mop cleaner was observed attached to wall above hand washing sink. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (452) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (704-1875) ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

(Cold hold unit ) located in the (serving line) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed at 53DF. At time of inspection ice packs were being used to keep TCS food cold. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Dispensers with soap and mop cleaner was observed attached to wall above hand washing sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (serving utensils) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024

The overhead door to the outside, located in the Kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
Cold hold located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Per interview, PIC states ice packs are used during service. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The overhead door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

Cold-hold units for salad were observed in poor repair in the lunch service area. Equipment must be maintained in good repair per manufacturer's instructions. Staff are utilizing ice and cold packs until unit is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
